commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Jacob said to Rebekah his mother, Behold, Esau my brother is a hairy man, and I am a smooth man: Hippolytus of Rome How clearly Jacob has shown here his piety. … In other respects it was also true what was said by Jacob, that is: “My brother Esau is a hairy man,” that is, a sinner, “but I am a man of smooth skin. ” In fact, through these words the faultless and sinless character of the flesh of the Lord is revealed.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
